next_action: Run /claude-mem:learn-codebase again in a fresh session (after /clear) starting at Wave C — api/v1/* + orchestration/* + llm/* + security/jwt_oauth2_auth.py + database/db.py
context_notes: DevSkyy corpus is ~2000 source files (1338 .py + 237 .ts + 123 .tsx + 141 .js + 162 .php after excluding vendor/node_modules/worktrees/archives). Each main-thread Read costs ~3-5k tokens (claude-mem observations + CLAUDE.md memory + frontmatter). Exhaustive read across one session is infeasible — but claude-mem captures observations from each Read regardless of context retention, so partial coverage still builds long-term cache. Architecture-critical Python is now primed: foundation (core/**), all 8 core agents, all 6 SuperAgents, render_pipeline ADK, claude_sdk integration, wordpress_bridge MCP, visual_generation.
